common.confirmReset: Reset all appearance settings to defaults?

ai.disclaimer: Translations were generated with AI — sorry for any spelling or grammar mistakes. You can submit corrections as a pull request on GitHub.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Theme, language, and per-kind asset colors. Saved to localStorage.
settings.aboutBlurb: Offline level inspector and asset extractor for Insomniac Games' PS3 titles. Open source — runs fully on your machine.
settings.themeHint: Dark is the original ReChimera palette; light flips background + text tokens, brand color is preserved.
settings.brandColorHint: Drives the active state of viewport toggles, tool-strip buttons, hover tints, and form focus rings. The app logo and splash wordmark stay in the original brand red.
settings.languageHint: Interface language for menus, modals, and settings.
settings.assetColorsHint: Used by proxy boxes, placeholder materials, and selection outlines in the viewport.
settings.selectionHint: Color of the highlight ring around the picked instance.
settings.proxyHint: Placeholder cubes shown while real meshes stream in.

openLevel.title: Open Level
openLevel.subtitle: Pick the folder that contains the level's .dat files.

cachePrompt.subtitle: {{mobys}} mobys · {{ties}} ties · {{textures}} textures in _rechimera_cache/
cachePrompt.cacheBodyOk: This level was already extracted into a local cache. Loading from the cache skips the heavy decode pass — the manifest, GLBs, and PNGs are read straight from disk.
cachePrompt.cacheBodyOkHint: Pick Re-extract if the source .dat files have changed and you want a clean rebuild. The streaming mesh pipeline runs either way; only the post-stream cache step differs.
cachePrompt.cacheBodyIncomplete: The previous extraction did not finish — the cache directory has files on disk but the manifest is either missing or marked complete:false. Loading from this cache would skip whatever didn't finish writing.
cachePrompt.cacheBodyIncompleteHint: Re-extracting rewrites the cache from scratch. The streaming mesh pipeline runs either way; only the post-stream cache step differs.
cachePrompt.staleWarning: Cache reports as stale: source files have a newer mtime than the manifest. Re-extracting is recommended.
cachePrompt.useCachedDisabledTitle: The previous extraction did not finish — re-extract to get a complete cache
